response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and deep technical curiosity, with notable contributions to developer tooling and open-source projects, but lacks explicit, recent experience with JVM ecosystems, Spring, or enterprise IDE tooling — core requirements for this role. His Java exposure is historical and buried among many other languages, raising concerns about depth in the required domain.
strengths: Proven track record in building developer tooling and open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Strong systems thinking and experience with complex, high-performance architectures (DLang, real-time systems)
Excellent communication and teaching skills, demonstrated through workshops and technical talks
concerns: No recent or prominent Java/Kotlin or Spring ecosystem experience in recent roles
Primary modern tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js, with Java appearing only in early or side projects
Lack of demonstrated work on IDE internals, language servers, or build tool integrations
